summary: Flip HEXA_ROUTING_CACHE default from OFF (opt-in via =1) to ON (opt-out via =0) in /Users/ghost/.hx/bin/hexa. Per omega-runner-5 measurement, cache ON saves ~142ms on warm exec; correctness model (env_hash invalidation + 5s TTL + LOUD failure on stale-route exec) holds.

edits.before: # --- L5: routing-decision cache (5s TTL, DEFAULT OFF) --------------------
edits.after: # --- L5: routing-decision cache (5s TTL, DEFAULT ON) ---------------------
# DEFAULT ON; opt-out via HEXA_ROUTING_CACHE=0 (omega-runner-6 flip 2026-04-26).

validation.trace_method: perl Time::HiRes wall-clock around /Users/ghost/.hx/bin/hexa --version with HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_DARWIN_MARKER=1 + NO_DARWIN_BYPASS=1 + FORCE_DOWN=1, cwd=/Users/ghost/core/nexus (sync-root path so cache_store at line 342 is reached)
validation.opt_out_evidence: HEXA_ROUTING_CACHE=0 run logged 'route=docker reason=mac_safe_landing' (full probe), NOT 'route=docker reason=cache_hit ttl=5s' — cache path skipped
validation.notes: Warm-vs-hit saving 118.5ms is the apples-to-apples figure (both runs had container already up); the 429.6ms miss-vs-hit reflects RUN1's first-touch container/image inspect cost. omega-runner-5's 142ms estimate brackets the warm figure.

stale_external_hetzner_down.path: _routing_cache_lookup returns 'external' → executes HEXA_REMOTE_BIN → ssh fails → __rc captured → if rc != 64, exit rc
stale_external_hetzner_down.user_observable: ssh stderr from hexa_remote (e.g. 'Connection refused' / 'Connection timed out' / 'No route to host'), nonzero exit code propagated. No silent miscompute.

stale_docker_daemon_dead.path: _routing_cache_lookup returns 'docker' → cached path at lines 287-301 still does a docker inspect for container.State.Running before exec; if inspect fails (daemon dead) the if-block is false and falls through to `_cached_route=""` then full path. The full path then hits _docker_hard_landing which calls _docker_daemon_alive and exits with HARD_FAIL_RC + LOUD stderr.
stale_docker_daemon_dead.user_observable: stderr 'hexa-resolver[hard]: docker daemon down — refusing bare-Mac fallback (rc=$HARD_FAIL_RC)' + nonzero exit. No silent miscompute.
stale_docker_daemon_dead.code_anchor: lines 287-301 (cached path) and 208-212 (_docker_hard_landing daemon check) in /Users/ghost/.hx/bin/hexa

rollback_recipe.method_a_env_only_no_file_edit: Set HEXA_ROUTING_CACHE=0 in shell rc / hook env to opt-out without touching the shim. Effective immediately for new shells.
method_b_revert_file_edits: Line 230: restore '# --- L5: routing-decision cache (5s TTL, DEFAULT OFF) --------------------'
Line 240: restore '# DEFAULT OFF behind HEXA_ROUTING_CACHE=1.'
rollback_recipe.verification_after_rollback: From /Users/ghost/core/nexus, run with HEXA_RESOLVER_FORCE_DOWN=1 + NO_DARWIN_MARKER=1 + NO_DARWIN_BYPASS=1; stderr should NOT contain 'reason=cache_hit' on second invocation.
